_comment: Isaac Lab-Arena eval jobs config for the fine-tuned Trossen DreamZero LoRA.
Reuses Arena's embodiment-agnostic pick_and_place_maple_table environment (scene + task +
success predicate) with our authored 'trossen_mobile_ai' embodiment (eval/isaaclab_arena_dreamzero/
embodiments). Run via eval/run_trossen_eval.py so the embodiment + DreamZeroRemotePolicy register.
TODO(sim): confirm pick_and_place_maple_table composes with the bimanual mobile embodiment; if not,
author a Trossen-specific scene/task. Camera extrinsics + gripper mimic also need in-sim tuning.

jobs.name: trossen_pnp_dreamzero_cube_in_bowl
jobs.language_instruction: Pick up the cube and place it in the bowl.
